summary: Tested US region feature for Car Service Tracker. All 19 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI tests pass for Match Debug page (region/schedule/mileage controls, verdict/rule trace display) and Estimates page (region selector, US schedule options in upload dialog).
passed_tests: GET /api/estimates/region-profiles returns 200
GET /api/estimates/region-profiles contains CA and US profiles
CA profile has distance_unit=km, currency_code=CAD
US profile has distance_unit=mi, currency_code=USD
US profile has schedule_selection_logic with SCHEDULE_1/SCHEDULE_2
GET /api/estimates/supported-vehicles returns 200
Supported vehicles have 'regions' array
Mazda CX-5 2022 has both CA and US regions
POST /api/estimates/debug/match US tire rotation Schedule 1 at 42000mi returns due_status=not_due, interval=7500mi, remaining=3000mi
POST /api/estimates/debug/match US oil change returns due_status=condition_based, trigger_type=wrench_indicator_on
POST /api/estimates/debug/match US spark plug returns correct rule
POST /api/estimates/debug/match US coolant flush returns first_then_recurring verdict
POST /api/estimates/debug/match US Schedule 2 tire rotation returns 5000mi interval, severe_only=true
POST /api/estimates/debug/match CA tire rotation returns 8000km interval
Debug endpoint returns rule_trace with rules_found, rule_selected, schedule_code, engine_filter
Debug endpoint returns verdict with due_status, schedule_used, interval_value, interval_unit
Region profiles requires authentication (401)
Supported vehicles requires authentication (401)
Debug match requires authentication (401)
Frontend: Match Debug page has region selector (Canada/United States)
Frontend: Match Debug page shows schedule selector when US selected
Frontend: Match Debug page has mileage input
Frontend: Match Debug page shows Verdict card after query
Frontend: Match Debug page shows Rule Trace card after query
Frontend: Match Debug page displays due_status correctly
Frontend: Estimates page upload dialog has region selector
Frontend: Estimates page shows US Schedule Options when US selected
Frontend: Estimates page has mileage input for US region
Frontend: Estimates page has schedule selector (Schedule 1/Schedule 2) for US
critical_code_review_comments: verdict_engine.py correctly implements due_status calculation for recurring, flexible, first_then_recurring, and milestone_replace interval types
estimate_analyzer.py properly integrates with verdict_engine for region-aware analysis
estimates.py router correctly handles region_code, schedule_code, current_mileage parameters
Frontend MatchDebugPage correctly shows/hides schedule selector based on region
Frontend EstimatesPage upload dialog correctly shows US-specific options
Frontend EstimateDetailPage has region badge and due_status display (will show for supported vehicles with region data)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and seeded maintenance rules
context_for_next_testing_agent: US region feature fully tested. Backend APIs (region-profiles, supported-vehicles, debug/match with region params) all working. Frontend UI (Match Debug page with region/schedule/mileage controls, Estimates page upload dialog with region selector and US options) all working. The existing estimate in the system is for a 2020 Toyota Camry which is not a supported vehicle, so region badge and due_status won't show for it. Only Mazda CX-5 2022 is currently supported with maintenance rules for both CA and US regions.
